sentences.arabic: نَظَّمَتِ الْمَدِينَةُ سِبَاقاً لِلْجَرْيِ يَوْمَ الْجُمُعَةِ الْمَاضِي.
sentences.translation: Grad je organizovao trku prošlog petka.
sentences.translationEn: The city organized a running race last Friday.

sentences.arabic: شَارَكَ مِئَاتُ الْأَشْخَاصِ مِنَ الرِّجَالِ وَالنِّسَاءِ وَالْأَطْفَالِ.
sentences.translation: Učestvovale su stotine osoba, uključujući muškarce, žene i djecu.
sentences.translationEn: Hundreds of people, including men, women, and children, participated.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْهَدَفُ مِنَ السِّبَاقِ هُوَ تَشْجِيعُ النَّاسِ عَلَى الرِّيَاضَةِ.
sentences.translation: Cilj trke bio je podsticanje ljudi na bavljenje sportom.
sentences.translationEn: The goal of the race was to encourage people to exercise.

sentences.arabic: حَصَلَ الْفَائِزُونَ فِي النِّهَايَةِ عَلَى مِيدَالِيَّاتٍ وَجَوَائِزَ رَمْزِيَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Pobjednici su na kraju dobili medalje i simbolične nagrade.
sentences.translationEn: In the end, the winners received medals and symbolic prizes.

sentences.arabic: تَمَنَّى الْجَمِيعُ أَنْ تَتَكَرَّرَ مِثْلُ هَذِهِ الْفَعَالِيَّاتِ الصِّحِّيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Svi su poželjeli da se ovakvi zdravstveni događaji ponove.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone hoped that such health events would be repeated.
